subject: A wild-eyed shaman or fire-touched figure leaning into a roaring bonfire, face lit from below by intense flame, eyes glowing orange
description: A close, tightly framed portrait of a frenzied figure looming over a great bonfire. Their face is uplit by violent orange-red firelight, eyes glowing molten amber, mouth open mid-shout or feral grin. Long dark hair frames the face and trails into smoke and embers. The fire dominates the lower half of the composition, sending sparks and waves of heat upward; the background is near-black with red and orange fire-glow bleeding into it. The mood is ecstatic, primal, and dangerous — fire-worship, battle-frenzy, ritual madness.
foreground: Bonfire flames with a screaming/exulting figure leaning into them
background: Dark void filled with embers, smoke, and fire-glow
